funFacts: The cabs of long-haul Monster Trucks often feature compact sleeper compartments with beds, fridges, and climate controls.
Heavy-duty semi-Monster Trucks are powered by massive turbocharged diesel engines designed to haul up to 80,000 pounds of freight.
